narrative.zh: 小熊想做一个大蛋糕！食谱上说需要把面粉分成4份，每次只加1份。
narrative.en: Bear wants to bake a big cake! The recipe says to divide flour into 4 parts, adding 1 part at a time.

narrative.zh: 蛋糕需要烤30分钟。小熊发现温度每5分钟升10度！帮它找出规律！
narrative.en: The cake bakes for 30 minutes. Bear notices temperature rises 10° every 5 minutes! Find the pattern!

narrative.zh: 蛋糕烤好了！现在要切给6个朋友吃！
narrative.en: The cake is done! Now cut it for 6 friends!
